phase_1_6.name: Directional Regime Filter
phase_1_6.description: Gate entries to direction-aligned market regimes. Reduces whipsaw trades in counter-trend environments.

phase_2.name: Trapped Trader & Early Exit Detection
phase_2.failed_continuation_definition: Stop hit if price reverts 30% of intended continuation distance
phase_2.risk_score_definition: Phase 2 risk < 25% triggers EARLY_EXIT signal (shadow only, not live execution)
phase_2.description: Detect weak continuation patterns. Identify when order flow absorption is insufficient. Surface early exit candidates for observation.

phase_3_4_shadow.name: Auction Location & Continuation Shadow Evaluation
phase_3_4_shadow.description: Evaluate entry location quality and continuation strength. Record decisions for later offline review. NOT affecting live alerts.

trade_engine.description: Fixed position sizing and profit targets. Fills simulated from actual trade events in order flow.

validation_checks: Anti-overfitting rules (no threshold tuning per day)
Regime dependency (works across BULL, BEAR, TRANSITION, BALANCE)
Symbol diversity (ES and NQ independent performance)
Direction balance (LONG vs SHORT win rates)
Volatility regime robustness (high vol vs low vol)
Consecutive loss limits (max 3 in a row acceptable)
Drawdown limits (max -10R acceptable over full session)
verdict_candidates: ROBUST_ACROSS_REGIMES - Works consistently across all market conditions
PROMISING_BUT_REGIME_DEPENDENT - Strong in trends, weak in balance
ONLY_WORKS_IN_TRENDS - Short leg broken, long only viable
OVERFIT_TO_FEW_DAYS - Edge seen in specific windows only
INSUFFICIENT_DATA - Need more sessions to assess
